title: helianthus angustifolius subsp. nuttallii
intro: Helianthus angustifolius subsp. nuttallii, commonly known as Narrow-leafed Sunflower or Nuttall's Sunflower, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthus angustifolius subsp. nuttallii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be utilized to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
